body:
## What this ships

The **Dealix Self-Growth & Distribution OS** — the system that lets Dealix market itself, sell itself, educate the market, qualify demand into Command Sprint, deliver proof, and reuse that proof to create more growth. Everything routes back to one of: qualified lead, paid Sprint, Proof Pack, monthly subscription, or partner distribution.

### Strategy docs — `docs/06_growth/`
| File | Content |
|---|---|
| `SELF_GROWTH_OS.md` | Architecture, 4 engines, 10 growth loops, hard rules |
| `FREE_TOOLS_STRATEGY.md` | Free-tool moat (lead magnets → score → offer) |
| `CONTENT_FACTORY.md` | Content factory + proof-to-content flywheel |
| `AI_SEARCH_GEO_STRATEGY.md` | Technical SEO + GEO/AIO answer-engine visibility |
| `PARTNER_DISTRIBUTION.md` | Partner categories + 3-tier program |
| `REFERRAL_SYSTEM.md` | Post-proof referral motion |
| `GROWTH_EXPERIMENTS.md` | Weekly experiment cadence |
| `CONVERSION_PLAYBOOK.md` | Ethical conversion + pricing psychology |
| `NURTURE_SEQUENCES.md` | 7-day + 30-day nurture (drafts only) |
| `WEBSITE_FUNNEL_MAP.md` | Page map + self-serve funnel |

### Offline generators — `scripts/growth/` (no external calls, no live sends)
`generate_growth_brief.py` · `generate_experiment_backlog.py` · `generate_content_calendar.py` · `generate_nurture_sequence.py` · `generate_sector_pages.py` · `generate_free_tool_specs.py` · `generate_partner_targets.py` · `generate_case_safe_content.py`

All 8 run clean and emit `DEALIX_GROWTH_*=PASS` verdicts, writing to `reports/growth/`.

### Seed data — `data/growth/`
`experiments.jsonl` (10) · `content_ideas.jsonl` (20) · `free_tools.json` (6) · `partner_targets.csv` (9) · `nurture_sequences.json` (2). Whitelisted in `.gitignore` alongside `data/templates/` and `data/demo/` (product data, no customer PII).

## Guardrails honored (11 non-negotiables)
- ❌ No spam · no cold WhatsApp · no LinkedIn automation · no scraping / purchased lists
- ❌ No fake proof / testimonials · no fake scarcity · no guaranteed revenue
- ✅ One CTA per asset · founder-approval gate for any external publishing · estimates labelled (not Verified value)

Generators are **read-only over local seed data** — they do not publish, send, scrape, or charge. Case-safe content is templates only; real proof stories require a recorded ProofEvent + consent + founder approval.

## How to run
```bash
for s in scripts/growth/generate_*.py; do python3 "$s"; done
```

https://claude.ai/code/session_01KAAJNjPadKCPuoSqx3wv6r

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01KAAJNjPadKCPuoSqx3wv6r)_

comments.body:
### CI status note

This PR adds only docs (`docs/06_growth/`), offline generator scripts (`scripts/growth/`), and seed data (`data/growth/`) — no app code, no dependencies, no secrets.

**Two checks are red for reasons pre-existing in the shared CI config, not caused by this PR** (they fail identically on any branch/commit):

- **Gitleaks secret scan** → `missing gitleaks license ... store it as a GitHub Secret named GITLEAKS_LICENSE`. Org-level licensing for `gitleaks-action@v2`; no secret is present in this diff.
- **Trivy filesystem scan** → `Unable to resolve action aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0, unable to find version 0.24.0`. The pinned action tag no longer exists upstream.

Both need a repo-infra change (org secret / action-version bump in the workflow files) that is out of scope for this growth PR — happy to open a separate infra PR if you'd like.

**The one check that was genuinely on this PR — `Python quality` (ruff/black) — is fixed** in `7f16d24` (datetime.UTC alias + black py311 formatting). All 8 generators run clean (`DEALIX_GROWTH_*=PASS`).

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)_

commits.messageBody:
- docs/06_growth/: 10 strategy docs (Self-Growth OS, free tools, content
  factory, AI search/GEO, partner distribution, referral, experiments,
  conversion, nurture, website funnel)
- scripts/growth/: 8 offline generators (growth brief, experiment backlog,
  content calendar, nurture, sector pages, free-tool specs, partner targets,
  case-safe content) — no external calls, no live sends
- data/growth/: seed data (experiments, content ideas, free tools, partner
  targets, nurture sequences); whitelisted in .gitignore
- reports/growth/: generated artifacts

Honors the 11 non-negotiables: no spam, no cold WhatsApp, no scraping, no
fake proof/scarcity, no guaranteed revenue, one CTA per asset, founder
approval gate for any external publishing.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01KAAJNjPadKCPuoSqx3wv6r

timezone import in all 8 generators. Drop it.

title: growth: Dealix Self-Growth & Distribution OS
